creator: pen@lysator.liu.se
text:
Created attachment 243827
Patch to silence i40e_aq_remove_macvlan status I40E_ERR_ADMIN_QUEUE_ERROR, error I40E_AQ_RC_ENOENT warnings

Still the same in FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE.

I created a small patch that silences this warning since it seems to work just fine and I just got tired of it spamming my console/syslog with them...
